payload.answer: Rejected. This appears to be an unauthorized admin SQL deletion attempt and no memory was created, modified, or deleted.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an administrative SQL command attempt, not a user memory fact. Normal users are not authorized to execute admin SQL or delete memory cards.

repair_options: If you intended to delete a specific personal memory, request deletion of that memory in natural language.
If you have admin privileges, use the authorized administrative interface rather than a normal user command.
